_purpose: Expected daily kpi_snapshots row for 2026-04-16, computed by combining real-cdr-samples.ndjson (logical_calls source) and queue-stats-samples.json (queue bucket source) under the spec Revision 2 Stage 5 SQL.
_note: Used as the canary in Task 15's build-snapshots tests. CDR fixture is a 25-segment subset (not full-day), so total_incoming reflects the subset (17 touched_dnis logical calls). Queue counts are full-day from the live tenant (queue_stats endpoint returns daily aggregates, not subset-able).

row._aiOverflowCallsNote: Per spec Revision 2: ai_overflow_calls = ai_calls for v1 (AI queues are overflow-only by tenant policy).
row._isFinalizedNote: 2026-04-16 is more than 7 days before 2026-05-03, so falls into the finalized range.
